name: octane_osl_smoke
description: End-to-end Octane OSL pipeline: enumerate snippets, drop a checker OSL texture into a material's diffuse channel, then attach a fisheye_180 OSL camera to a CameraObject. Locks the Octane OSL surface area discovered 2026-04-29 (plugin id 1039813 for 'OSL texture' shader; tag id 1029524 for 'Octane Camera' with mode OCT_CAMERA_OSL=3).

args.script:
import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['OSLTestCam', 'OSLChecker', 'SmokeOSLChecker']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
m_old = doc.SearchMaterial('OSLChecker')
if m_old: m_old.Remove()
cam = c4d.BaseObject(c4d.Ocamera)
cam.SetName('OSLTestCam')
cam.SetAbsPos(c4d.Vector(0, 100, -500))
doc.InsertObject(cam)
mat = c4d.BaseMaterial(c4d.Mmaterial)
mat.SetName('OSLChecker')
doc.InsertMaterial(mat)
c4d.EventAdd()
print(f'setup ok: camera + material ready')

import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
o = doc.SearchObject('OSLTestCam')
if o: o.Remove()
m = doc.SearchMaterial('OSLChecker')
if m: m.Remove()
c4d.EventAdd()
print('teardown ok')
